member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.AIInterviewSessionsController.JoinSessionByToken(System.String)
member.summary: Candidate joins the interview session by token. Triggers HR notification.

member.name: T:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.BrowserAgentController
member.summary: Browser Agent 控制器 - 浏览器自动化简历采集 API（按需采集）

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.BrowserAgentController.Collect(TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.BrowserAgentCollectRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: 按需采集：针对指定职位从 Boss 搜索并采集符合要求的简历

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.BrowserAgentController.GetJobPosts(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 获取职位列表（供 HR 选择要采集哪个职位）

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.BrowserAgentController.SaveSession(TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.SaveSessionRequest)
member.summary: 保存当前登录态（手动登录后调用）

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.BrowserAgentController.Navigate(TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.NavigateRequest)
member.summary: 手动导航到 URL（调试用）

member.name: P:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.BrowserAgentCollectRequest.JobPostId
member.summary: 必填：目标职位 ID（从 /api/browser-agent/job-posts 获取列表）

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.InterviewInvitationsController.GetInvitations(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 获取面试邀请列表（分页）

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.InterviewInvitationsController.GetInvitation(System.Int32)
member.summary: 获取单个面试邀请详情

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.InterviewInvitationsController.GetInvitationByToken(System.String)
member.summary: 通过Token获取面试邀请（候选人端，无需登录）

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.InterviewInvitationsController.SendInvitation(System.Int32)
member.summary: 发送面试邀请（生成链接并发送）

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.InterviewInvitationsController.ConfirmInvitation(System.Int32,TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.InvitationConfirmRequest)
member.param: 确认请求（可选：调整面试时间）

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.InterviewReportsController.GetReportBySessionForCandidate(System.Int32)
member.summary: Candidate accesses their own report by session ID (no JWT required - uses session token pattern)

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.JobChannelContentsController.GetAllByJobPostId(System.Int32)
member.summary: 获取职位所有渠道适配内容

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.JobChannelContentsController.GetByChannelType(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: 按渠道类型获取适配内容

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.JobChannelContentsController.AdaptContent(TalentPilot.Api.Models.Entities.AdaptContentRequest)
member.summary: 触发职位内容适配到各渠道

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.JobChannelContentsController.Update(System.Int32,TalentPilot.Api.Models.Entities.UpdateContentRequest)
member.summary: 更新适配内容（手动编辑）

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Controllers.NotificationsController.GetNotifications(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 获取通知日志列表（分页）
member.param: 通知类型筛选：InterviewInvitation, InterviewReminder, Offer

member.name: T:TalentPilot.Api.Services.BrowserAgent.BossPlatform
member.summary: Boss 直聘平台采集适配器（按需采集模式） 流程：登录 → 职位搜索 → 截图识别 → 相关性过滤 → 详情采集 → 存入DB

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Services.BrowserAgent.BossPlatform.EnsureLoggedInAsync
member.summary: 确保已登录（加载 cookies 或提示手动登录）

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Services.BrowserAgent.BossPlatform.RunCollectionAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: 按需采集：针对指定职位从 Boss 搜索并采集符合要求的简历

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Services.BrowserAgent.BossPlatform.CollectResumeListAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: 采集简历列表（原始模式，不做相关性过滤）

member.name: T:TalentPilot.Api.Services.BrowserAgent.CookieSessionManager
member.summary: Cookie/Session 持久化管理 - 保存和加载登录态

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Services.BrowserAgent.CookieSessionManager.GetCookieFilePath(System.String)
member.summary: 获取指定平台的 Cookie 文件路径

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Services.BrowserAgent.CookieSessionManager.GetSessionFilePath(System.String)
member.summary: 获取指定平台的 Session Storage 文件路径

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Services.BrowserAgent.CookieSessionManager.HasCookies(System.String)
member.summary: 检查 Cookie 是否存在

member.name: T:TalentPilot.Api.Services.BrowserAgent.PlaywrightBrowserManager
member.summary: Playwright 浏览器管理器 - 通过 CDP 连接到 Windows Chrome 注意：WSL 中通过 --remote-debugging-port=9222 连接到 Windows Chrome

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Services.BrowserAgent.PlaywrightBrowserManager.NeedsLogin
member.summary: 检查是否需要登录（通过页面内容判断）

member.name: T:TalentPilot.Api.Services.BrowserAgent.VisionParser
member.summary: MiniMax Vision API 截图解析器 - 从简历截图中提取结构化数据

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Services.BrowserAgent.VisionParser.ParseResumeListAsync(System.Byte[])
member.summary: 解析简历列表页截图 - 提取候选人卡片列表

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Services.BrowserAgent.VisionParser.EvaluateCandidateRelevanceAsync(TalentPilot.Api.Services.BrowserAgent.ResumeListItem,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: 评估候选人与职位的匹配度（MiniMax LLM 判断）

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Services.BrowserAgent.VisionParser.BuildSearchUrl(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: 根据 JD 关键词构建 Boss 搜索 URL

member.name: M:TalentPilot.Api.Services.MiniMaxMessageResponse.GetFirstText
member.summary: Extracts the actual text from the response, skipping MiniMax M2.7 thinking blocks. M2.7 returns content blocks where block[0] is type=thinking (no Text field) and block[1+] is type=text.

member.name: T:TalentPilot.Api.Services.ResumeCollectionScheduler
member.summary: 简历采集定时调度器 - 每6小时自动采集所有活跃渠道的新简历
